message:
fix(review-r3): hide unrelated focused ATC rows

Write failing test first: focused_atc_sections_hide_unrelated_rows_when_agent_has_no_matches reproduced that a focused robot ATC view for an agent with no matches still leaked unrelated decisions, executions, and degraded liveness rows.

Fix the focus filters so an explicit agent focus retains only matching rows and otherwise returns empty sections instead of falling back to global operator state.
